title: dalbergia tricolor var. tricolor
intro: Dalbergia tricolor var. tricolor, also known as the Black Acacia, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Dalbergia tricolor var. tricolor include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with the plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. In traditional medicine, Dalbergia tricolor var. tricolor is prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
